install.name: install
install.description: Install project dependencies and update lockfile (non-frozen)

install:ci.name: install:ci
install:ci.description: Install project dependencies using frozen lockfile

steps.exec: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const version = JSON.parse(readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')).version; const pkgPath = 'workspaces/cli/dbx-tools/package.json'; const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync(pkgPath, 'utf8')); pkg.version = version; writeFileSync(pkgPath, JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + '\n');" && mkdir -p dist/js && pnpm --dir workspaces/cli/dbx-tools pack --pack-destination ../../../dist/js
[ -f package.json ] && chmod a-w package.json && [ -f workspaces/cli/dbx-tools/package.json ] && chmod a-w workspaces/cli/dbx-tools/package.json

release:push.name: release:push
release:push.description: Tag, push the release tag, and let CI publish on tag push

release:tag.name: release:tag
release:tag.description: Build and pack from the git tag that triggered CI

steps.exec: [ -f package.json ] && chmod u+w package.json && [ -f workspaces/cli/dbx-tools/package.json ] && chmod u+w workspaces/cli/dbx-tools/package.json

node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const ref = process.env.GITHUB_REF_NAME ?? ''; const version = ref.replace(/^v/, ''); if (!version) throw new Error('GITHUB_REF_NAME is required'); const root = JSON.parse(readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); root.version = version; writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(root, null, 2) + '\n');"

'); writeFileSync('dist/changelog.md', '# ' + tag + '

Tagged release.
');"
